examples: The child was eating pottage from a porringer.
This is where the Idiom Mess of Pottage comes from.
And Jacob sod pottage: and Esau came from the field, and he was faint.
Former Bucks Fizz singer Cheryl Baker was one of those stuck near Pease Pottage.
We're sitting in a queue to get petrol from Pease Pottage services.
